use_cases: Trigger primary actions in forms and applications
Navigate between pages or views using the link variant
Execute destructive operations with the destructive variant
Create secondary actions alongside primary buttons
Integrate into pagination controls for page navigation
ai_summary: A versatile button component from Origin UI featuring multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) with consistent rounded-lg styling, subtle shadows, and proper accessibility states. Built on Radix UI Slot for composition and CVA for variant management, making it suitable for any web application requiring interactive controls.
